title: PR3 6BP, Resource Recycling Solutions Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/QB3036RB/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Resource Recycling Solutions Limited Installation name: Iron House Farm Permit number: EPR/QB3036RB/V005  "
